channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku? — 64 replies — 256.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku?

Open thread • Replies: 64 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:48 UTC

OP

Should EU countries have a power to strongly dissuade other member states from committing economical sudoku? The example is Germany -- decided to shut down its nuke plants during the Russia energy crisis. Should other EU members be able to call for an intervention to get such a self-destructive crackhead back on track?

Germany economical failures thread.

Early replies (first 3)

62103567
>>62103558
>puccian propaganda
>"gice germany destroys itself blyat"

62103569
>>62103567
You hohols are so insufferable its incredible.
>>62103558
No EU should not get more powers, they should get less.

62103573
>>62103567
Also wtf is propaganda? That we did shut down our power plants? That we are on the way down with incredible quick increasing costs for boomer pensions, migrants, incredible slow and incabable bureaucrazy and foreign countries.....like ukraine.
And no this is not some internet doomer thing, germany is economically unironically done and it will show hard this decade.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62103804
>>62103799
that chart is of prices bro

the claim "nuclear is expensive"
the reality "power is cheaper in 70% nuclear france"

62103809
>>62103795
>Parasites will literally move elsewhere
your brain literally may not work bro

they have been coming for decades and that wont stop until the standard of living is lower than where they are coming from.

62103813
>>62103803
shutting down nuclear power did not diversify your energy sector. it did the opposite.

62103816
>>62103804
Germany had three remaining reactors post 2022. Were talking about stuff we have, not stuff we wish wed have. Also France has a lower population density and huge backwater land for guerilla conflict. Germany literally nukes its own core population just so some boomers can have cheap shit. Not gonna happen.

62103823
>>62103809
>let me tell you about your country
Lion share of foreigners here are EU migrants, its not my fault and not Ursulas fault that females do not breed on an overpopulated wealthy continent.

62103946
>>62103733
>mein quelle ist ki daher weiß ich das das funktioniert
Tut es nicht. Wasserstoff ist nicht für das Stromnetz. Das Stromnetz würde jeden Abend zusammenbrechen du absoluter Dimwit. Aber das wäre gut dann würden die Leute mal aufgerührt.

62103952
>>62103823
>Lion share of foreigners here are EU migrants
Why do you lie? ´

62103958
>>62103946
Ich arbeite in der Branche, Wasserstoff/Biogas ist buchstäblich für die Spitzenüberbrückung. Halt einfach deine dumme Fresse.

62103960
>>62103952
Sorry Ghetto dweller. Obviously I speak from my middle class neighbourhood.

62103969
>>62103960
OH YES OF COURSE ITS ALWAYS THE SAME WITH YOU SCUM
>diversity but not for me haha
Good neighborhood is a codeword for white neighborhood.
Guys like you are the worst
>>62103958
>Ich arbeite in der Branche,
No you dont
>Wasserstoff/Biogas ist buchstäblich für die Spitzenüberbrückung.
Spitzenüberbrückung ja genau SPITZENüberbrückung. There you see you just got this from AI and dont know shit about it. Its only good to smooth it over the day. Its never enough to save enough for a whole week of cloudy windless weather. And i dont want to start about winter. Its mostly for cars and there its a good idea. Not for the power system.
Holy retard

62103974
>>62103958
Btw im not saying it cant work with 2040 technology. But it doesnt work with 2026 technology. No way to save enough gas.

62103984
>>62103969
>I am a poorfag pleb
Go back to pol then you fucking tourist.

>hydrogen I-is not for the grid
You goalpost moving retard. It is for the grid, the Bundesregierung advances its capabilities to decentraly produce electrical energy via highly mobile gas engines.

62103988
>>62103974
It already is working, 2030 data centers are going to rely on hydrogen-ready technology. Moron.

62103996
>>62103558
Merkel knew that a big war is coming and that nuclear facilities will be primary targets once all red lines have been crossed. She then used the Fukushima happening asa scapegoat to ban nuclear power plants.

62104052
>>62103996
Retarded cope.

62104077
>>62103558
Nuclear power makes sense when there's high sustained demand.
Germany shares a border with 9 other countries. There's always the possibility of buying / selling electricity to balance the grid. Fluctuating renewables also make nuclear less attractive.
Then there's specialization going on inside the EU and France happens to make the nukes and the nuclear stuff. This way Germany can host the largest conventional military without becoming too threatening to its neighbors.

62104083
>>62104077
This guy gets it. Heil EVROPA.

62104382
>>62103799
Of course it is, but not for the same reasons, today its just about racking in taxes through carbon tax, none cares about actual carbon emissions

62104495
>>62103558
The EU was designed by the Americans to bleed Europe dry.
Thanks to the EU regulators, they have no industry of note, no digital platforms of note, and they now rely on American liquified natural gas.
Every EU politician should be placed in front of a firing sqaud.

62104514
>>62104495
>t

62104859
>>62103984
>I only care about me fuck the others
Least egotistical liberal
>did not reply how it can work in winter

62104867
>>62103558
>we need to transition to clean energy
>no not THAT kind of clean energy, that one is bad because of some shit that happened 40 years ago in the soviet era
I will never understand leftoids

62104904
>>62103988
Nothing is working, we have absurd prices to import power and still need coal.
>>62103984
>>62104083
>we need to import browns (but pleeeeeeassse not where i live)
>but hail evrope
glowing hard

62106080
>>62104859
>I am a loser that larps having empathy
Fuck off back to /pol/. This board is about business, not your turkish neighbour. Hydrogen is stored in summer, what the fuck is your problem, polgroid?

62106083
>>62104904
>we have to import its sooo expensive help me I am a faggut
Read again, you fucking faggot. Europe is a balance act between our neighbours, not your perfect pig sty with enough cheap cummies.

62106615
>>62103558
It was america's plan all along. Green parties are CIA controlled. So is the medias, Merkel, and most politics in germany.
Sabotaging the nord stream 2 was a way for america to increase germany's production costs.
Higher production costs means less competitive.
Less competitive means america cans take over germany's markets.
America wants to cannibalize european markets. And also wants to absolutely prevent any Berlin-Moscow axis (alliance).

62106629
>>62106080
>>62106083
Neighbors like austria and the ones balancing us and are mad as fuck. You are just iltra retarded because you can.
>still defends brown immigration
>BUT NOT TO ME PLEASE

62106713
>>62106629
Not responsible for your well being. Fuck off, faggot. Cheap cummies is short term. EVROPA is for eternity.

62107113
>>62106713
>EVROPA is for eternity.
Its literally beeing replaced as we speak
The people define Europe not the landmass

62107123
>>62106713
>Not responsible for your well being
But you feel responsible for ukraine well beeing? Typical liberal asshole.

item.title: Why aren’t you holding BTC? — 85 replies — 241.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why aren’t you holding BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 85 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:41 UTC

OP

If you’re still watching or waiting to buy BTC, why not do it now?
>I guess you’re wasting time, or maybe you just prefer altcoins. What’s your reason?

Early replies (first 3)

62087977
>>62087937
I only watch it to laugh at Saylor and you bitsteinbaggies. Not buying digital nothing.

62087993
>>62087937
Waiting for sub60K

62087997
>>62087937
I don't have enough money for it to make me rich. Alts have a good chance of vastly outperforming BTC during the next big pump. I've decided to take the potential for a 10x over the guarantee of a 2x.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62100201
>>62087937
I unironically only buy LINK
not shilling, don't give a shit anymore, I'm just going to keep stacking it for my kids to use for collateralised loans when DeFi goes maistream

62100233
>>62100201
You're shilling chainglink

62100295
>>62099777
when 2x

62100334
>>62087937
I'm all in on BTC, nothing else, I staked some, most especially now that TBV is gaining traction and most BTCFI are keeping BTC native, I believe this is a huge chance BTC hit 200K this year

62100530
>>62087937
I do and my boomer index funds like spy are outperforming it. So do my PM`s. The only reason I hold is because its tax free after 12 months, thats literally and unironically it.

62101348
>>62100334
Makes sense. Once TBVs integrate with Aave V4, BTC collateral demand could scale quickly and unlock much deeper liquidity in BTCFi.

62101354
>>62091551
You can't judge based on that lol

62101365
>>62091723
that’s basically how all markets work when you think about it.

62102223
>>62100192
Ledger is cool

62102233
>>62100530
Wtf is that

62102249
>>62101348
I see aave v3 is better

62102256
>>62100233
Shylink shitlink

62102324
>>62102223
Yeah and being able to interact with DeFi there with millions of users while keeping self custody makes everything feel a lot safer and more seamless.

62102341
>>62091734
You should have ordered healthy foodies kek

62102346
>>62102233
a teenager

62102364
>>62102249
V3 is solid. V4 just went live a few weeks ago. Deposits are still ramping up. Kinda pointless comparing that to years of development. Give it time anon.

62102377
>>62095458
reread it anon

62102716
>>62087997
I made this same mistake in the last cycle. Trust me, all the liquidity will go into BTC, so it's better to buy and keep it on TBVs for yield instead of going for alts

62103228
>>62097432
The smuggest are newfags because they're trying to build their own conviction by mimicking the toxic maximalsm during the fork wars. The oldfags have either all left or have the ability to laugh at one's own expense. Bitcoin still hasn't done anything meaningful and "orange pilling" your retarded friends doesn't help. I consider myself a closet maxi because I do believe in bitcoin but I'd never associate with them or go to a meetup/conference.

62103805
>>62095600
For many bullish reasons

62103981
>>62095620
And are you expecting what then?

62105081
>>62100014
Depends on your goal.

62105096
I DCA into Bitcoin. It can either go up or it can either go down. I'd rather take my chances than holding gold for 30 years for a +1k profit

62106216
>>62095867
Which 'obvious' shift?

62106279
>>62106216
Its quite obvious desu

62106298
btc is going to 20k if not lower

>>62097398
>'good alts' will vastly outperform
have you been asleep for 5 years?

there was like 3 alts that outperformed btc out of literally millions. your odds are terrible for alts, much better chance to just throw it all on red and call it a day

62106312
>>62106298
>btc is going to 20k if not lower
>there was like 3 alts that outperformed btc out of literally millions
Bottom signal, the retards maxxing are back

62106435
>>62106298
Idiot

62106463
>>62097125
DCA doesn't work you stupid nigger. Just look at Michael Saylor, he's down -5% after SIX YEARS of dollar cost averaging

62107082
>>62106463

ngmi

You're not smart enough.

item.title: Youre gonna take $20 an hour and like i....AAACK — 46 replies — 184.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Youre gonna take $20 an hour and like i....AAACK

Open thread • Replies: 46 • Updated: 2026-04-12 15:02 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62104731
Absolutely based
Tf schlomo gon do

62104839
none of these issues would exist if jews didn't

62104861
>>62104714
Incredibly based, you love to see it.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62104989
>>62104714
What's his immigration status? Anyone know?

62104990
>>62104989
Im betting on h1b

62104993
>>62104878
and what about the next 1k just like him?

62105008
>>62104989
I'm pretty sure this is good for me no matter what

62105011
the reason wages are shit is because of abduls flooding the west

62105062
>>62104714
Isn't this the type of shit you see before a civil war/conflict?

62105109
>>62104714
Notice how both aren't white

62105290
>>62104894
This. And all the wagies working there are out of a job. Sucks for them.

62105301
>Don't like pay
>Don't take the job
Na let me just throw my whole entire life away lel

62105399
>>62104894
The good news is that other people can do the crazy shit and throw their life away while I sit back and reap the keks. It truly is the best of both worlds.

62105456
>>62105301
Ikr. Brokies think they are owed a job.

62105502
>>62104731
throw you in jail for 30 years kek. Have fun wagie!
>>62104993
you won't do shit

62105555
>>62104714
Too many poorfag third worlders on this board now.

62105755
>>62104714
based

62105941
>>62104714
>"Hehe goy deal in the real wor- NO NOT LIKE THAT"

62106265
>>62104714
At least he gets free housing

62106277
>>62105555
>t. cletus making 55k per year and didnt receive his toilet paper order

62106313
>>62105555
fecaloids fear these digits

62106335
>>62104714
They shouldn't have taken his stapler.

62106421
>>62104714
Clearly this rocket scientist needs to be payed more for stacking toilet paper in a warehouse.

>Muh shareholders
Buy stocks and claim ownership.

62106544
>>62105109
Protestant amerigolems love their masters too much, it's a dirty job but someone's gotta do it.
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Luigi_Galleani

62106659
>>62104886
>free healthcare
>free housing
>free food
>free gym
>free education
you're going to cope and INSIST that he gets raped by bbc, because that's the only way prison could be worse than your "free" "life" as a wageslave.

62106783
>>62105008
Actually, no. You live in a timeline so gay that even when people put their foot down over how retarded and jewish shit is, it turns out to be bad in the long run.

62106790
I don't want to sound rude or nasty but honest to sneed I can't comprehend how people can be born in the USA and be this entitled.

The average college graduate salary there is higher than the average salary of Oxford graduates in the UK, like just put the slightest bit of effort in and the reward is so insane.

I'm not sure if it's true or not but I saw on reddit this guy was making between $25 and $35 an hour which is just insane and on par with a professional in the UK.

62106798
>>62104714
Truecels Rising

62106903
>>62106659
You can get the free stuff outside the prison by being a jew.

62107003
The /pol/tard seething is palpable, bunch of fat righoids walking around with AR-15's playing tough meanwhile lefties are actually taking care of business kek

62107054
do wagies in these forklift factories really make $20? that's what welders make.

62107158
>>62107054
Shitty welders maybe

62107199
>>62106790
He was making $19/hour in California which is fuck all

item.title: It costs 300k to raise a kid — 27 replies — 108.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
It costs 300k to raise a kid

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:53 UTC

OP

WTF are normies doing? What are they even spending money on?
Now women refuse to have kids because it'll nuke their lifestyle, while destitute browns have 10 kids.

>buy diapers
>food cost is negligible
>hand me down clothes
>wife does child care
>public school is free

I bet /biz/ could raise a kid on 20k.

Early replies (first 3)

62104065
>>62104059
Basterd benchid donut rase da kid! Shalom rabbi!

62104067
>>62104059
govs keep raising taxes as if that doesnt have a cost. "its only 750 more dollars this year bro! gotta pay for bloated bureaucracy bro!"

62104095
>>62104059
I do believe you also factor in opportunity costs. you support a child for what? 20-25 years? thats money that could have been in the stock market. I child also requires you to move into a better neighborhood, bigger apartment, bigger car and everything else that comes with it. 200-300k sounds realistic over that time span. just because you can live frugally, doesnt mean your child can.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62104104
>>62104059
Why does every media picture that has a baby involved always has brown babies in it and whenever abortion or anti-natalism is involved there use pics of white people and babies?

62104107
>>62104104
Jews have plans and u know it, dont ask stupid questions!

62104113
>>62104059
Women don't want to have kids and I don't blame them. Human pregnancy is inefficient compared to other animals due to the head size of human babies. It radically changes the body and the person for the rest of their life. There is minimal "bounce" back. The brain changes. We will have artificial wombs one day, so these issues of people not having or wanting children will be moot when an artificial incubator can do all the work. They'll also be able to make babies from your skin, so you won't even need to find a woman to procreate with anymore if you so choose.

62104117
>>62104113
Hey vitalik! Hows mainnet scaling?

62104123
>>62104059
>wife does child care
This thing alone will cost millions in lost opportunity. You realize that now both of your retirements are on you?

62104153
>>62104059
Every time I see someone with kids I am thankful I'm not them. I can't imagine spending 300k on them and having no freedom or free time. inb4 /biz/ copes about kids being cheap because of "muh hand me downs" and "muh food is cheap". We all know that's bullshit just like your 200k remote do-nothing job and 8 inch dick.

62104255
>>62104059
>food cost is negligible
Lmao
>hand me down clothes
Not everybody has close family
>wife does child care
Sure, unless she has a phone or TV and gets blasted with propaganda to be a stronk independent wahmen
>public school is free
Your whole list could have been summarized with:
>I'm not 18 yet and I don't get it

62104511
>>62104059
>kids
It's
>keeyids

62104518
>>62104059
Usually it costs 800k, but when a nigger is depicted it suddenly goes down to 300k.

62104534
>>62104059
Thats for 18 years you fucking tard

62104581
>>62104059
that picture is AI

62104957
>>62104113
Naturally
A: Women get their first child as teen when the bones can still grow
B: Women eat real food and are not malnoutrished so they have wide hips
And bam birth is easy. You retard think nature made an error? Civilization made an error.

62104970
>>62104059
if you don't vax them, healthcare goes down to zero. homeschool them and they won't care about buying dumb shit because the other kid has it.

62105055
>>62104059
Maybe they cost 10k max

62105057
>>62104113
>moot
Who?

62105076
>>62104095
This. Raising a child when he’s still a 40 year old, kissless virgin living with his parents will cost them at least $300k by then. Parents pray that Skeeter Jean, JiDion, ElizXbeth or Alex Rosen catch him with CP on his phone one day and let the cops send their mankid to jail for life and put the parents out of their misery lol

62105950
They keep inflating these numbers by adding in the cost of college and assuming that additional kids don't get marginally cheaper as you accumulate stuff that can become hand-me-downs. They also assume you're a total goy-cattle and buy everything from clothes to baby toys brand new.

Violently reject the anti natal propaganda

It has never been easier for you to have an outsized impact on the demographic and genetic future of the species than now. US total fertility is 1.57 on average. Globally, the only populations that are technologically capable and not in TFR freefall are Israelis (including the secular ones), the Nordics, and Anglo settler states (USA/CAN/AU/NZ). These are the only population groups worth betting on or forming business ventures with. Because they are the only ones that are going to matter.

Get your genes onto the orbital habitats.

62106191
>>62104059
So new dad with a 1.5 yr old.
Kid expenses:
>0-6 months
Food: $0 (only breastmilk)
Clothes: $150 (once upon a child for discount clothes and toys)
Toys: $100
Carrier: $0 (family friend's old one)

>6-12 months
Food: maybe like a $100? (She would eat like half a cucumber or three chocolate chips for a "meal" + breast milk)
Clothes: $200 (bigger = more fabric = little more expensive)
Toys: $200 (also relatives gift a lot if toys so not bad
Carrier: $150 (size up)

12-16 months
Food: 300? Idk, still not much at all
Clothes: $400 (i got her a bunch of non-discount stuff because i thought it looked cute, not a necessary expense)
Toys: 150
Carrier: same size

62106346
>>62104123
/biz/ makes me feel sane. I was also thinking the same thing.

>childhood friend gets his first gf at 29
>married and had a baby within a year of meeting her
>got her pregnant while she was finishing her masters
>fast forward 2 years
>son has autism and some heart valve problem
>wife has never had a job at 28
>she plans to stay home with the son for another year, at least
>meanwhile my friend works like 60 hours a week making like 3500 euros a month
>needs to smoke, drink and binge shitty online games to keep up with the stress
>she doesn't even cook, they live in walking distance from her mom so she just eats there like 3-4 times a week with the kid and my friend has to order food or cook for himself


All I can think of is "what the actual fuck?"

62106420
>>62106191
R u a retard? You forgot diapers

62106481
>>62106346
>wife has never had a job at 28
my sister leaves her child at her/our parents for the majority of the time even though she is physically fit and earns really good money. the child is already 13 and as far as I can tell he considers his grandmother as his actual mother. despite all that she still makes demands on how to raise the child. I swear to fucking god modern women/mothers are cooked. everywhere you go you see mothers on their fucking smartphone instead of interacting with their child, let alone giving them internet/social media access early on. this is a lost generation. I look at my nephew and I get somewhat scared, not because of him but because I realize his generation has to build/main the world in the next 20 or so years and they are nowhere equipped to do so.

62106774
>>62104104
Jews

62106784
>>62104059
Damn. Every brownoid has millions to spend on kids.
>inb4 their spending our money
I know.

62107157
>>62104059
>wife does child care
heh

item.title: MONDAY OIL — 15 replies — 60.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
MONDAY OIL

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:56 UTC

OP

Give me one reason not to go all in with 100x leverage.
Literal free money has never been more certain

Early replies (first 3)

62106393
you have to expect at least one jewish trick from trump / bessent that will dump it back down first. I would enter after that happens.

62106406
>>62106388
>by the time you make it back after being drafted (IF you make it back) that shit will be back down to earth
Amritard problems, bruh

62106425
>>62106388
Its on binance, wont moon.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62106434
>Axios will publish a propoganda article about making peace
>Trump will post a Truth talking about being close to a deal.
>Oil will be down 2-3%
JUST

62106436
>>62106434
this is what it will be

62106437
>>62106388
It's too late you should have invested on friday

62106497
>>62106434
And bombs will still fly left and right in the meantime.

62106523
>>62106388
If you’re so certain this thread wouldn’t be necessary

62106534
>>62106406
>Muh draft
Are you 12? Is this your first time seeing a conflict involving America?

62106657
>>62106388
It’s already priced in faggot. You think you’re faster than the algos? By the time you hit the buy button on Monday, all the profitable trades will have already been made and you will make $0

62106718
>>62106534
most people on this website are retarded. i should stop coming here.

62106843
>>62106388
Taco Tuesday is coming.

62106942
Trump will probably taco out of this blockade, but lets see. If not we're going to the fuckin moon

62107030
>>62106843
at this point the taco is Bearish too (ground invasion)

62107176
>>62106534
This is your first time seeing America starting a conflict with a real country

item.title: Should I sell all my BTC right now? Yes or no. Please answer quickly. — 8 replies — 32.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Should I sell all my BTC right now? Yes or no. Please answer quickly.

Open thread • Replies: 8 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:53 UTC

OP

Should I sell all my BTC right now?
Yes or no. Please answer quickly.

Early replies (first 3)

62106794
>>62106680
Trust your gut anon
Do you truly believe hodling is worth it?

62106828
Iran will be collecting $2 million in bitcoin per ship. thats billions per month. you do the math.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62107071
>>62106680

Yes.

62107094
>>62106828
> naval blockade
cheeto dusted monkey blocks your chart

62107095
>>62106828
iran won't be collecting anything

62107127
buy high and sell low thats my motto

62107160
>>62106680
Yes and buy in October, we warned you, you ignored us.

item.title: It’s time for BTC to be delisted from exchanges. — 3 replies — 7.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
It’s time for BTC to be delisted from exchanges.

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:37 UTC

OP

People are speculating on what coin Iran is going to use to collect tolls in the Persian Gulf. So far the consensus seems to be BTC.

Wouldn’t a privacy coin that is harder to seize with no back-doors be the most appropriate coin for this use case?

If it isn’t privacy coin summer and Iran goes with BTC, BTC needs to be delisted from exchanges for “supporting terrorism” (opposing jews).

Other coins have been delisted for less.

Early replies (first 3)

62106569
>>62106560
The Chad Xerxes was also a jewbs enjoyer which is very /biz/raeli approved. However, the Virgin Movie Xerxes was an enjoyer of “real women” which is also extremely based and /biz/raeli approved.

62106577
>>62106569
Xerxes was unironically the good guy in “300”.

62107059
>>62106560

Have fun staying poor, OP.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Potential Shitcoin? Airdrop - geck0.xyz — 3 replies — 7.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Potential Shitcoin? Airdrop - geck0.xyz

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:37 UTC

OP

dev might be releasing the coin on this alternative 4chan soon, it's got a neat idea on /market/ where you put in the contract address of a coin and you can earn "VESK" so you can shill and be rewarded, or if you post some losers you can lose vesk

he's waiting on a certain number of accounts to be created before release (also you get an airdrop for making acc)

Early replies (first 3)

62107002
>>62106945
Cloud says it's totally normal to reply to this thread with “fuck you,” so fuck you!

62107014
SAAAR BENCHODE BASTURD PUMP VILLAGE TOKEN

62107058
>>62107014
nobody involved with this is a jeet

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: Average rent in the US is $1,740 a month. — 52 replies — 105.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Average rent in the US is $1,740 a month.

Open thread • Replies: 52 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:33 UTC

OP

Average rent in the US is $1,740 a month. You have to work 87 hours of a 160 hour work month to make that on $20 an hour. Then you have to pay for food, and fuel, and insurance, and utilities...No wonder everyone is so poor

Early replies (first 3)

62105140
>>62105137
Quiet paypigs, get back to work

62105144
>>62105137
i had a roommate for 5 years and now i have my own house.

62105148
I am literally medically retard and I make $39/h. Any non retard person should be make at least $60/h, is not that hard if you are not retard.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62105674
>>62105137
I retired a millionaire in my 30s without issue

62105737
>>62105137
My rent is $900/mo and I split it with a roommate.

Not my problem.

62105866
>>62105137
Kinda bullshit. If you're too broke to be able to afford rent, then share the rent with other people. That cuts your spending in half, or in a third, or even better. Get a girlfriend or a boyfriend and move in together. It's not that difficult.

62105873
>>62105190
When I was in my mid-20s I was working in IT consulting, being shipped off to random other states and being given an apartment to live in (paid by the company) and a "per diem" for food and other expenses. Git gud.

62106064
>>62105137
>I wanted to be a single sex and the city slut instead of a stay at home girl
Soup served with all flavours you wanted, bitch.

62106070
why did this woman leave her home at 18?

>>62105190
yea if you want something you might need to work...

62106074
>>62105873
>retards talking about "When i was young"
You people have no fucking clue how fast the demographics have changed
Nothing is the same

62106089
>>62105137
The average is jocked up by idiots that dont do their research and try to cling to shitty overpriced areas.

>>62105866
Sharing rent with a girlfriend/boyfriend is fine but with a friend or even just a random person is stupid. If they lose their job, you are likely to get abused.

Some people though should just face the music that they shouldnt be moved away from their parents.

62106196
>>62106089
> shitty overpriced areas.
No such thing. Places are expensive for a reason.

62106203
>>62106089
>overpriced
Those areas are high demand. No such thing as overpriced when you’re actually talking about nice place in a big city away from trash. Luxury home areas are always pricey.

62106237
>>62105873
ameriburgan millenial software engineers are unironically the boomers of their generation times ten
you got the easiest ride of history by far. circumstances differ now

62106239
>>62105137
LET THE GOYIM
DEAL
IN

62106244
>>62105188
That was me for the earlier part of my 20s, will be 27 soon. It really isn't worth it unless you do it for years, get a house from it or make an insane amount of money hourly to justify it.

62106250
>>62105737
>>62105253
My roommates are Nogs and one seems to be synchronized to my bowel schedule so he always beats me to the shitter naturally like 15 mins before I have to go and I have to enter his worm domain expansion. It fucking sucks bros. 37 and can't flush the toilet properly. Always uses my toilet paper. Leaves it a mess and the outside area a mess. Asked me for $5 the other day, needed it for his Uber eats. Better than being homeless I guess.

62106267
>>62106250
grim

62106354
>>62105137
I voted for this

62106373
>>62106196
>>62106203
>No such thing as shitty overpriced areas
Lol&lmao

Anon did you know by any chance that apartments commonly like to require you to make 3x the rent? So for my pic for example in the middle of some worthless fucking city unironically wants you to make 6 grand a month to move in?

If nots not shitty and overpriced youre fucking retarded and I shudder because you probably habve a car mortgage.

62106395
>>62106373
Overpriced how? Landlords ask that much cause people make that much.

62106473
>>62106395
>landlords ask that much because people make that much
How about charging for a rate based on expenses instead of literal rent seeking? Its too bad inflation for a century+ has everyone scrambling to understand how much USD is (not) worth for goods and services anymore

62106522
>>62106250
Wtf...

My roommate is based and has almost the exact personality as me. Neither of us want people in our apartment. We're both organized and clean. We both like similar music. We both cook and neither of us care if the other uses ingredients the other bought, because if one of us cooks, we just cook for both of us. We both go to the gym. And we work opposite shifts, so one of is is always home.

62106553
>>62105137
This is the lament of a woman who just hit the wall. She is seeing how empty her party life has been, her unfulfilling make-believe HR job isn't the thrilling career feminism promised her, a diminishing number of guys are willing to buy her dinner, she is starting to get seriously fat or wrinkled or both. She is seeing how her life choices have driven her into a cul-de-sac, how her golden years are over, and now she wants to blame "the economy". Weep your heart out, strong, independent woman.

62106632
>>62105873
greetings dipshit, you still receive a lot less than you would've during your parents time. congrats, you're a high ranking peasant in boomerville.

62106640
>>62105190
>live with random people youve never met before
DUDE JUST SIGN A JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE LEASE AGREEMENT WITH TOTAL STRANGERS LMAO

62106644
>>62105873
overnight travel for work is the most humiliating wagecuckery imaginable.

62106672
I thought paying rent is based and totally the financial better option? Oh no no

62106676
>>62106672
it is. op is just a women with their usual girl math problems.

62106709
>>62106672
depends on your lifestyle and goals. if you're a high earning sperg it makes more sense to rent because the comparison is 1 bedroom rent vs 3-4 bedroom house with a mortgage. if you're a sperg what are you doing with the extra 2-3 bedrooms? nothing. you're better off investing the difference between $1700/mo rent vs. $2500/mo mortgage.

62106823
>>62106250
that's hilarious and tragic anon, good luck out there

62106904
>>62105137
You shouldn't consider moving out of your parents home until your earning at least $50/hr. I earn $95k/yr but I still sleep in my childhood bedroom.

62107038
>>62106904
>I don't wanna grow up I'm a toys-r-us kid
Stunning and brave anon. Your parents must be proud.

item.title: any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management… — 68 replies — 75.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management…

Open thread • Replies: 68 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:08 UTC

OP

any WFH chads can you tell me how you found your job
I have hospitality, customer service and even low level management experience but im not getting any offers on my applications
Should I get some cyber security certs? which ones should I focus on if yes?

Early replies (first 3)

62084718
Funny of you to ask OP, I remember my struggles of landing my first WFH job. Btw, WFH stands for Work from Home because not many people come across that term usually. But, if you must ask, our company is headquartered in Nashville. My base pay is 95k per year along with a COL stipend and generous health and pension benefits. As we speak, I am clocked into my position in the beautiful hot springs in British Columbia. We do have an RTO policy, but I haven't been to the office in 4 years! Ha-Ha! You COULDN'T pay me to work in the office. Yesterday I had fun fucking a uni student that transferred from china for the school years, so yeah life is great so far. Today she is making me her traditional Chinese dinner as a thank you for fucking her so nicely. Maybe next month I'll fly out to Holland and do my job for the month. But like I said OP, keep your chin up and don't be disuaded by the multiple rejection emails in your future until you get that golden offer. Take it and run with it. Anyways .... Chiao!

62084729
>>62084718
thanks for the response anon
Did you use indeed or pay for a website that specializes in WFH jobs like flexjobs etc? I'm wondering if indeed is just all scams at this point and if it might be worth it to pay a job finding website to filter the garbage

62084746
There are no jobs anymore. 200,000 people have been laid off in the last six months while job creation is negative. 90% of job openings go to immigrants anyway.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62092902
>>62088548
>what certs?
Welding or something else actually valuable

62093225
>>62084678
You too buddy. Thank you!

62093956
>>62091196
you got this anon

62093995
>>62084678
Thanks for the image OP. I've been in a bad spot mentally lately due to some stuff that happened, but will keep going now instead of trying to convince myself to give up.

62095273
>>62093995
Bases resilient anon

62097589
>>62084678
I'm a civil engineer, originally in the office before covid, but the position turned into a WFH position during covid and we never really went back.

62097818
>>62084678
I do WFH cybersecurity for a bank but I have massive experience and credentials and have literally worked with (not at) the NSA and I was still out of work almost 2 years.
I mean it's good if you can get a job. It would help a lot if you're black or a woman and I'm not kidding.

62097824
>>62084803
>technical writing
Lol AI can already replace that entire career field.

62097830
>>62085875
>>62085904
>>62085904
>>62087410
Correct. It is a gay fake job suitable for DEI hires.
You need to do hard-core real work as a white man. Cyber is now where companies stick their women and blacks.

62097875
>>62084718
This was me but moved to Poland on 125k USD / yr.

>>62084729
There are tons of remote job sites and even lang specific ones. I shifted to golang and can't imagine anyone works from the office in this lang.

62098209
>>62097875
>Poland on 125k USD / yr.
Damn, baller. Nobody in the U.S. would even interview me for remote cybersecurity jobs unless I was in certain states.

62100225
>>62097830
>it’s for females and minorities
That’s probably why your gay ass works in cyber security

62103272
>>62084678
Bump

62103921
>>62084678
I was on Fiver years ago, got banned after I agreed with a client to just work with them over email, and ive done it ever since.

62104035
>>62084678
I work in tech and not for public companies. Startup unicorns are still usually wfh

62104258
there aren't many positions where you can "work from home" and do shit all every day. your best bet is to apply to chainlink labs

62104775
>>62103921
How did they catch you breaking the rules?

62104981
>>62104775
Fiver scans all messages on their platform between you and clients to check if youre trying to pay without going through fiver

62105685
>>62104981
Can you just exchange socials and then setup the deal that way?

62105877
>>62105685
Bannable.

62106174
>>62104258
I thought you guys said chain link labs only hires pink hair HR ladies?

62106213
>>62084678
WFH "chads" are either larping or blind to how disposable they are seen

I highly suggest you stay out of jobs with that gimmick because HR salivates at the idea at eliminating any person who gets paid decently with some offshore alien. And to make matters worse theyll cut your hours and underhire intentionally so theres a mountain of shit to do while you fufill their harsh metrics.

The lack of commute is nice dont get me wrong(and I can especially imagine that if you live in a shithole like NYC or Cali) but it isnt worth just how unsecure your job is and also how utterly demanding it gets.

T. Worked 2 WFH jobs. The common theme between the two of them is that there was always a tremendous assload of work whenever I started shift and work itself was so aggressive I never wanted to do OT. I quit the second one in particular because during lull months for the company they cut my hours. When I started doing inperson work shit got a lot less stupid and I was ok working OT again.

62106222
>>62106213
Lack of commute is nice in shitholes like ATL, Dallas, or every other state in the country. Name one state that you would love to commute in

62106326
>>62106222
I think youre missing the point by asking that. It IS nice but not nice enough to put up with the rest of the garbage that comes with WFH. They are not jobs youre gonna go 20+ years with and retire on nor have that wonderous "dude I only do 4 hours of work a day in my pajamas and get paid for 12!" For long if at all. They are 100% either looking to get rid of your ass or practically turn you into a seasonal worker.

62106349
>>62106213
I *AM* the offshore alien. Work for an american Fortune 500 company. Full WFH and paid double the national average here in East Europe.

I remember being worried when Trump first became president that he will eliminate these jobs LOL

62106374
>>62097830

>apply for cybersec job
>mark black in the application
>don’t turn on your webcam during interview
>or use AI to make yourself black on screen

Why wouldn’t it work lol

62106382
>>62087410

This. Cybersec is a scam / DEI busywork that goes to (usually military) lunchtime rowdies in DC and Virginia, or foids. I got security+, cysa, pentest, network+, CEH etc, and a meme bachelors degree in cybersec back in 2022 and still haven’t gotten a job. Got about one offer since then, and it was a shit position for like $50k in the deep south. It’s also gatekept like hell. Even the reddit tier lefty white male hiring managers won’t hire you

Meanwhile you see foids and nogs on youtube, tiktok and linkedin bragging about their cushy $80k - $100k+ do-nothing cyber jobs and they have like one preliminary cert

62106486
>>62106174
yes, hence the recommendation. still not a woman, but wfh

62106871
>>62106326
Where are these non shithole cities anon

62106912
>>62106213
this only applies if you're in a low skill or white collar factory worker job (i.e., codetranny.) i work in a niche financial reporting role at a megacorp. fully remote and promoted several times to manager level roles despite the rest of my team being hybrid in another state. i'm not saying i'm indispensable or that no one could possibly do my job. i'm just saying that i have enough "high stakes" responsibility that i am immune to threats of RTO or offshoring.

item.title: 13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI? — 45 replies — 55.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI?

Open thread • Replies: 45 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:14 UTC

OP

13 months of consistent investing and I’ve breached 50K am I GMI?

Early replies (first 3)

62100428
>>62100422
which stocks

62100432
>>62100422
Based

62100469
5 digit heaven

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62103196
>>62100422
Ngmi

62103218
>>62100943
Don't waste your youth chasing dollars. Don't be a degenerate either though.

62103270
This is unironically enough for a down payment on a couple houses in my area that would net you 1,000 cashflow a month, good job OP.

62103291
>>62100422
That's a horrible yearly wage.

62103329
>>62100422
Yes

62103345
>>62101884
Set and forget investing is underrated and SCHD is the king of that category. At least max your Roth IRA with SCHD.

62103349
>>62100422
>am I GMI?
Yep. Keep it up for only 20 years and you can retire as a millionaire unless inflation fucks you.

62103354
>>62100943
I went from 29k to 58k in 9 months here in Europe. Good job, anon.

62103407
>>62100422
this is the textbook way of doing it. id put 10k in MSFT now and wait a year to sell

62103516
>>62100474
>im still wealthier than you btw
>t.

62103545
>>62103354
What stock? You can't trade American stocks in Europe

62103565
>>62103545
Not one stock and of course I worked and saved money.

62103571
>>62100422
Congrats OP
>am I GMI
Yes fren, wagmi

62103694
>>62103345
My idea was whatever snowball happens from SCHD stock and dividend ratio growth would not outweigh total market returns but maybe I’m wrong
Hard to say cause it just shot up in value by twenty percent cause people wanted stability but then it flatlined

62103698
>>62103516
>>62100519

62103710
>>62103698
>french
Quot erat demonstrandum.

62103720
>>62103710
richer than you, despite the fact that you make 200k per year and me only 50k

skill issue i guess

62103721
>>62103698
en une heure?

62103726
>SCHD
>quarterly dividends
EWW no thank you only monthly payers for me, pay me like i’m your world of warcraft subscription baby

62104160
>>62103218
Oh yeah
I mostly focus on a lot of easy stuff I can passively do at work or home (have my own office at work and can use my phone)

62106274
>>62100422
50k wow now you can buy a used car. Cause your going to have to pay 30% of that to the government

62106320
>>62106274
>amerilard
>buys gaz guzzlers for 50k
Cringe.

62106428
>>62103710
>Quot
Quod

62106464
>>62100943
>bought a dip
Yesssssss, you can time the market because you are uniquely intelligent just keep doing it. You'll be a millionaire in no time.

62106603
>>62106464
Are you retarded

62106606
>>62100422
Actually yes you will make it. Keep this up another decade and youll have a milly. Then you can play the game of when do you feel like retiring?

62106619
>>62106603
Yeeeessssssss I am retarded you are so smart keep buying the dip, take out margin to buy the dip, sell your house to buy the dip, the line only goes up just keep putting money in always make financial decisions based on market conditions

62106822
>>62100943
The American empire is in decline, you need to be diversifying somewhat into VT or VXUS total-world / international etfs.

>>62101150
don't fall for this meme also. SCHD is for boomers who already have like 1~2 mil invested and want to just live off the dividends. If you are just starting you want high growth etf's and can move into SCHD later if you want.

62106841
>>62106619
OP never mentioned about aiming to buy the dip he said he did once luckily
Too busy posting your faggot copy pastas to read?
>>62106822
Also, good advice on getting more international stocks in your portfolio

62106939
>>62106274
>50k for a used car
basement dweller

item.title: A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn… — 25 replies — 25.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn…

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-04-12 14:03 UTC

OP

A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking. Does that mean if I’ve staked 2000 LINK, I’d earn $2000 per day?
Is that true, or was the anon just talking bullshit?

Early replies (first 3)

62095857
fuck stinks
hate them all
their dicks are fucking small
fuck stinks
hate them all
their token's price will fall
it really is that simple

62098788
soon …

62098818
>>62095845
>A few weeks ago, an anon posted that if Chainlink succeeds and everything goes as planned in the future, you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking.
How schizo must one be to believe this shit?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62099283
>>62095845
>basing your financial decisions based on some imaginary income that doesn't even exist

62099287
>>62095845
Didn't read, only came here to mock you and ch*inlink.

kekbaggies.

62099288
fuck every single stinkie
hate em all forever
think they're worthless and dumb yeah

62099312
>>62098788
>Sergey is the only one of all of them who ascended enough to break out to freedom.
Checks out.

62099425
Link fuddies will be tortured mercilessly and kept as pets/trophies

62099443
Link is gonna end up like this. Forgotten.

62099448
>>62099425
oh i'm so intimidated
except, for you to achieve this sick reality, first you would have to 'le win'
i.e. $1000 link
and we all know that's never gonna happen
so you lose
the end
gg
no
re

62100690
After you've made it with Chainlink, what will you tell people when they ask , 'How are you so rich?'

62100718
>>62099312
That’s anon donning the flannel. It’s symbolic you twunt.

62100787
>>62100690
Who are these people? I don’t talk to anyone so why are they asking me these questions??

62101143
the constant link psyops tell you everything you need to know.

62101887
daily reminder: fudders are shitposters

62101938
>>62101143
>>62101887
it's just every day investors calling out a shitty investment when they see one
nothing more

62101990
>>62101938
>t. gaslighting tg brownoid

62101992
>>62095845
You will reap the rewards alright linkie.

62102182
>>62095845
WHERE IS SERGAY

62102192
>>62095845
staking is literally a pyramid scheme. You can do it, but it doesn't make your 1s and 0s magically more viable as a potential use-case.

whoever said that you could make that kind of money from links is a retard, and you're a retarded faggot for believing them. Sell everything, and put all your money into JEPQ on wall st, you aren't smart enough to do this shit without losing everything to some 2bit con artist.

62102452
>>62095845
>you could earn $1 per 1 LINK per DAY through staking.
If this happens, I will cut off my dick and eat it on livestream. For real, no cap.

62102603
>>62102452
That would mean that the Community staking pool would receive $27.375B a year to distribute. That's not farfetched if we expect the Chainlink Network to collectively process 1 Quadrillion dollars in transactions (i.e. more than the DTCC) a year. That's 3.65*10^-3 % of the transactions. Suppose Chainlink takes 0.01% of the Quadrillion dollars as revenue for the network, 10^-4 *10^12 = 10^8. yeah we're short to be able to pay out to the staking pool which would require $27.375*10^9. Might have to cut that down to 10 cents a link a day.

62105169
>>62102603

I would be more than happy with even 10 cents a day.

ps how much for a gf like pic related ?

62106377
>>62105169
go to a mental asylum, you'll probably find an older version of one. She's got soo many red flags you should be able to hear her, or the drama surrounding her, before she even appears.

She'll also ruin your life. If you're not white, just go to south east asia and find a nice girl there, one who doesn't whore herself out immediately to you of course, with a nice family.

62106886
>>62095845
If BTC shits the bed now, $5 is guaranteed.

item.title: the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy — 49 replies — 23.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-04-12 12:58 UTC

OP

followed closely by NEETS that don't get pussy

then wfh chads or people who genuinely love their job

it's never a good deal to have a job, work 40 hours a week in something you despise, having to be on time, bowing to your boss, dealing with shitty customers and clients, even if it gives you the money to live on your own and maybe get laid or have a gf, the humilliation is not worth it, the money doesn't fix the daily defeats that working for a wage deals to your spirit.

and then of course the lowest state of being is to wage 40 hours a week and still being a virgin, I pray for these people, they are living in hell.

I went from waging in IT and getting pussy to not waging and going back to my parents house, I haven't gotten laid in a year and I still prefer this deal over having to be on the office on time, my soul is regenerating from the damage it suffered from having a job.

Early replies (first 3)

62102105
>>62102068
Wtf is “get pussy?” Like a relationship aka emotional investment even if just a very casual friend? Or actual gf which is even more emotional investment?

62102115
>>62102105
getting pussy is the act of inserting your penis in a pussy, there are many methods to do this, but the act is the same.

62102119
>>62102068
> my soul is regenerating from the damage it suffered from having a job.
As someone who did the whole school, college and work thing, lemme tell you something. It takes about 3 years for you to feel normal. It took me about 3 years after retirement to feel like my teenager self again.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62102547
>>62102213
Everyone is a slave to pussy
It's the better form of masturbation

Question is how much shit are you willing to take for the life size fleshlight?

62102594
>>62102119
took about nine months for me to recover but i suppose, due to the backlog of self-inventory, eventually three years as well to transition to a new skin.

62102599
>>62102068
>and then of course the lowest state of being is to wage 40 hours a week and still being a virgin, I pray for these people, they are living in hell.

Where do I fall? 70 hours a week, virgin, 41, and paying for my borderline-personality mom's nursing home. I have zero friends or hobbies and my doctor suspects I have early-onset dementia. On top of all this, I live next to a drug dealer who has kept me awake with his bullshit for the last decade.

62102628
>>62102068
>the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy
yeah, but how the fuck am I gonna get pussy as a NEET?
I have NEETbux but live at home, no car, shy introvert, etc. and I'm 35

62102631
>>62102376
I just got laid off 3 weeks ago and literally just started taking full size shits again
Before I when I was waging I was constantly constipated and would only poop once every 3 days or so.

Lost 10 lbs and literally haven’t changed shit other than golfing more

62102677
>>62102628
How did you do it before?

62102699
>>62102677
>How did you do it before?
I didn't.

62102806
>>62102599
it's over, I could not go on living in your situation, god bless you.

>>62102628
that is why it's the highest state

like a bodybuilder, packing muscle (sex) while shredding fat (work)

62102868
>>62102400
cope, the neet pays more with his time

62102892
>>62102806
>it's over, I could not go on living in your situation, god bless you.

Thank you, but the only reason I haven't kms is because I think there's a 1% chance I will burn in Hell if I do. I'm trapped in this life until I die.

62102908
>>62102868
nigga money is time if you aren't born with it, and texting a bitch is way less effort than whatever you do to eran your money.

you should see what the average dude spends directly or indirectly on women, it's tragic.

>>62102892
hell is a psyop to keep niggas working

62102943
>>62102068
>the highest state of being is NEETing and getting pussy
Highest state is being independently financially secure through a mysterious source of income. This includes having your own home.

>then wfh chads or people who genuinely love their job
All mid. They love it, but could they financially afford to really STOP doing it at any moment? Most would say no. That might be love, but it's also necessity.

And let's not even get started on where sex havers would really be ranked (pig disgusting baka).

62103102
>>62102908
>hell is a psyop to keep niggas working

That's brutal

62103109
>>62102068
>ur in hell if u have to work & no muh dick
again what the hell is this board?

62103488
>>62102068
Based thread wagies seething at it.

62103497
>>62102190
i dont understand how men end up begging for sex after months or years of relationship

i am the one who dont want to have sex with my gf after months or years of relationship

like why would i want to fuck the same pussy constantly it s so fucking boring

i only have sex with my gf when she is ovulating and i found out that she was lying about her ovulation period to get more sex from me so i told her to get ovulation tests instead of believing her ovulation calendar

if she is not pregnant before 2027 i dump her btw

62103506
>>62102631
are you me?

since i got laid off one month ago i shit massive logs

62103518
>>62102892
Is there a reason you can't move away from the drug dealer at least?

62103520
>>62102068
rich neet with pussy on demand is literally peak existence
unironically the modern equivalent of royalty

62105539
>>62103506
being a big shitter is shit if you are working, I need my me time to shit, relax my body and mind, then sit on the toilet for 45 minutes and push the little nigger out, can't do that when working.

>>62103520
word

62105893
>>62102144
Capitalism/materialism has driven people insane and now every relationship has to be transactional. I mean don't get played but have a heart.

62105979
>>62102068
I've been NEETing for 10 months and traveling the world with my gf. I think that puts me at the tippy top.

Of course I still have routines to keep my body/mind in shape. Everyday I hit the gym, play chess, and keep my Spanish streak going on Duolingo.

62106085
What about wfh virgin?

62106151
Gibsmaxxed, deliver pizza three days a week while the government pays my mortgage, putting $300/week into my retirement account.

62106211
>>62105893
> I mean don't get played but have a heart.
How, bro? Pretend I am rich, what can a girl offer me I cannot buy? While my wealth keeps growing, her looks keep fading.

62106217
>>62105893
You are pretty much telling a high value male to pretend he has no value. Why don’t you tell every girl to pretend she is ugly and deformed?
Stupid.

62106225
>>62106085
>What about wfh virgin?
Above pussyfree wagie, but below sexful middle-management cuck

62106262
>>62102165
>>62102594
>>62102119
Dude waging eats at you
Six months into my job I realized I became a husk that only has enough energy to go back to work. All my goals, dreams, personality traits just became grey goop. I am happy that after gooning so much I received a post nut clarity so powerful that it reminded me of what the fuck I started this job for.

62106634
>>62102068
Cringe, if you are not doing the needful for the betterment of your nation state you are an embarrassment

62106637
>>62106225
how much money do I need to be able to own something like that?

OP

Buckle up... it's about to get bullish asfxck....

They're using LUNC retard. I cant believe the schizos were right. I should have got a bag

62102493
>>62102474

>Alpha Lions Academy
Holy fuck, Alpha AND a Lion?! This guy sounds like he really knows what he's talking about! Bullish as fuck!

62102659

62103231

62103262

62103333

62103339

62103365

62103368

62103383

62103502

62103555

item.title: Polkadot - First halving — 295 replies — 19.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Polkadot - First halving

Open thread • Replies: 295 • Updated: 2026-04-12 00:07 UTC

OP

https://polkadothalving.com/ 10 more days. https://www.parity.io/blog/refining-polkadots-economic-architecture-issuance-DOT-DAP-and-network-adjustments
https://x.com/Polkadot/status/2028482336463945765
"
Polkadot’s economic upgrade begins rolling out in 10 days.

Enhanced tokenomics increases DOT scarcity and introduces new governance and staking mechanisms.

▸ DOT supply capped at 2.1B
▸ Emissions cut 53.6%
▸ Unbonding from 28 days to 24-48 hours
"

Early replies (first 3)

61933757
Guys?

61933779
>>61932834
10000$ @ 6.5
i dont sell my dotty

61936705
Guys?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62087587
>>62087253
>>62087258
So, what's your point exactly? Thank you for the bump

62087811
>>62087587
My point is, Lark Davis has forsaken you. It's ogre.

62088494
>>62087811
Ok, that's great you informed us. And so what's your point again? I still don't see it.

62088504
>>62087811
Like, how does that do anything for me or anyone? Like what's your point in regard to how that affects DOT? Or anything? I really don't see a connection

62089608
I hope you guys slurped the bottom. We're cooking now, boys.


Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62091358
1.33>13 DECEMBER

62093297
>>62085250
>and then scrambling to make an EVM to attract more developers
Actually, even this is not completely really true to be honest. The whole point of DOT 1.0 was to be able to make L2s. That was done and complete and there's like 40 L2s running on DOT. Then DOT 2.0 came and with it came Asset hub. Asset hub is a COMMON GOOD L2 that can run, as you've mentioned, EVM smart contracts and also PVM smart contracts which are SUPERIOR to EVM because the use the RISC-V architecture. You literally make it seem like launching EVM compatibility is a bad choice where in reality it's a move forward in order to make the chain more flexible.

https://polkadot.polkassembly.io/referenda/1864 Deploy Universal Deterministic Deployment Proxy (CREATE2 Factory) on Asset Hub
This ref passed today making it so that people can launch their EVM smart contracts on the same address as they have on ETH or other L2s. So Uniswap will soon launch on Asset Hub on the same address as they're on ETH or any other L2.

62093456
>OP is desperate to shill his heavy bags.

62093506
>>62093456
>>OP is desperate to shill his heavy bags.
Actually I'm from Mumbai and Gavin Wood is paying the Mumbai warrior gang to keep the thread alive. I've already collected 11.5k DOT and every day after day 30 I get an additional 150 DOT. The thread is 35 days old. So I got 11.5k DOT + 5*150 DOT.
P.S.: Thank you Arjun for bumping the thread and giving me an excuse to re-bump it again. I'll come over to your house later and give you the money we were talking about. Good job my young Vishnu Mumbai warrior.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62093917
>Poopman loves his gay little coin
I'm NOT a Vishnu Mumbai warrior. I'm Muslim!!!!

62094207
>>62093917
Nice, keep on bumping the thread Arjun, my little Mumbai warrior muslim living in Mumbai, the city of DOT. See you at the mosque on Sunday my little Mumbai warrior. Keep the bumps coming. I'll give you more DOT on Sunday for you effort.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094396
>>62094207
>See you at the mosque on Sunday
Friday, kaffir!

62094480
>>62094396
>Friday, kaffir!
Ah yes Arjun hajji, I have forgotten. Of course! Praise Allah, the al-ilah, all-powerful God. We are the chosen people. Everyone else is a goy. We shall rule the world with our DOTs, the crypto of Islam. Praise be Allah Christ Vishnu.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62094791
>>62089608
>>62093506
>>62094480

Stop larping as an Indian

62095346
>>62094791
Good job Panjali. Bump the thread you I can bump it off your comment. Our small village of Mumbai shall eat for a year of this thread alone.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097729
Dear Mumbai warriors,

I hope you slurped the bottom. I hope you inhaled the smell for it is time. It is time to go back to where we belong. To 55$ and beyond. Mumbai warriors, it is OUR TIME.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62097956
bump for polkacurry

62098919
>>62097956
Yes, my fren Rohit. We, the Mumbai Warriors, will eat the best PolkaCurry there is. We shall express gratefulness to our lord Wood while we eat with SPOONS I tell you my friend. The time where we ate with our bare hands is over Rohit. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with a metal SPOON Rohit. Today, we embark into the bright new future that was laid out thanks to our spiritual leader Lord Wood. Vishnu of the mindchain bless him. Oh Rohit, how far we have come. The Mumbai warriors shall bring the whole of Mumbai, the city of DOT, into a bright future. Soon the period of enlightenment begins. Mumbai warriors, if you can hear me, give me your best BATTLE SHOUT !!!

Shouts: "TOGETHER WE STAND UNITED AS PROUD MAN OF THE MIND CHAIN. RISE MY BRETHREN. RISE MY WARRIORS. TAKE UP YOUR ARMS AND LET'S FIGHT FOR OUT GLORIOUS LORD WOOD. FOR MUMBAI, THE CITY OF DOT AAAAAAAAAAA"

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62099150
>>62097729
Aren't you shorting DOT?

62099687
>>62099150
PSSSTTT, Panjali. Do I look like a Nintendo to you? Stop playing me and telling them the plan. Panjali, shut your mouth or no PolkaCurry for you young Vishnu mind. Do you want the Mumbai warriors to eat with metal spoons or with their hands? Do you want an age of enlightenment? If yes, then give us your best battle shout my young Vishnu warrior. Scream so hard that Gavin Wood, our spiritual leader, will hear your voice a top mount Hyjal.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62100207
>>62099687
based street shitting dot preacher

62101334
>>62100207
Thank you. I try my best to be the best street shitter DOT preacher. We get paid really good and therefore we eat with metal spoons and not with our hands.

Best regard from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102768
Remember my young Vishnus of the mindchain. THIS YEAR NOMT + JAM go live on DOT (and other major upgrades). With that DOT will position itself to be about 10 years ahead of the competition. The bull market bottom has probably already been reached. Even if we go lower it won't be for more than like 10%. Maybe we'll get a black swan event mid summer, maybe we won't. The next cycle is probably going to be THE SUPER CYCLE, THE GOLDEN BULL RUN. I would position myself in a project that has some utility like DOT. The meme coin bullshitery is OVER. People are going to go back to their roots. There is no more stupidity left in the market. If you guys can't understand that then so help you Vishnu.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62102845
Just realized this thread has been up for more than a month.

62102949
>>62102845
Yes, I've been saying that I'm paid by Gavin Wood directly and that we, the Mumbai warrirors, are eating with metal spoons instead of our hands because of it!

>>62068446
>>62071796
>>62071796
>>62079572

The Mumbai warriors are winning and we're entering a time of enlightenment in Mumbai because of it. PolkaCurry for everyone. Join us

62103152
My Mumbai warriors, my young Vishnus of the mind chain. Remember. This is THE bull run. I hope you are stacking. For this bull run will decide the winners from the losers. This is the GOLDEN bull run everyone has been talking about. This is IT. The decisive moment where the projects that will become the new Nvidia, Amazon, Google. Choose wisely my young Mumbai warriors for reality is not what it seems. If a coin has no utility. If the network can't handle millions of TPS at a cheap cost then there is no point in investing into it. DOT has everything anyone would think of as an important feature to have and soon, this year, JAM and NOMT and other major upgrades will hit. It'll revolutionize what the sector STANDARD is. Soon my brethren we will be called THE CHAIN. We will be a major focal point, a nexus if you will, for the whole Web3 world. We will be the center and the bridge for every other chain. Enlightenment is upon us my Mumbai warriors. Rise my brethren, rise into a new dawn of magic.

Best regards from Mumbai city (The capital of DOT),
Vishnu Kumar

62103167
Kafir token!

62104249
100$ END OF BULL RUN MY YOUNG VISHNU MIND CHAIN MUMBAI BRETHREN WARRIORS.

62104293
>>62103152
>>62104249

Not indian.

62105141
>>62104293
Good one Panjali. You will get many DOTs once we meet at the shrine of Gavin, in Mumbai city, the city of DOT, the city of the Mumbai warriors. Yes Panjali, we shall eat with METAL spoons. We shall consume our PolkaCurry with pride and dignity. We won't eat with our hands no more. It is done. We have evolved, we have become enlightened, we are one with existence.
